---
title: "Exercise 7: Machine learning II"
---

::: {.learning-objectives}
- Implement and evaluate decision trees, and neural networks for a business prediction task.
- Compare models with respect to accuracy, interpretability, and practical implications.
- Recommend a suitable model for deployment.
:::





## Exam prep

TODO : include specific questions/tasks that could be included in the exam.

::: {.callout-tip title="Session 7 survey"}
Before you wrap up, please complete the Session 7 survey here: [{{< var sessions.session_7.survey_url >}}]({{< var sessions.session_7.survey_url >}}){target="_blank"}. Thank you 🙏
:::
